_meta.author: chowlol202
_meta.title: Modern Timeline
_meta.description: A responsive, accessible, and fully themable Timeline / Roadmap component built with ShadCN UI and Tailwind CSS. Supports vertical and horizontal layouts, animated progress, dark/light modes, and rich content like icons, dates, and status badges. Ideal for SaaS roadmaps, onboarding flows, or project timelines. Cleanly structured and highly customizable via props.
